## Relationships (Application-Layer FKs)

**ITEM_HISTORY** -> CUSTOMER_MASTER (CUSTOMER -> CUSTOMER); INVENTORY_MSTR (PART -> PART); INV_IN_TRANSIT (TRANSIT_NUM -> TRANSIT_NUMBER); ITEM_MASTER (BIN->BIN, HEAT->HEAT, LOT->LOT, SERIAL_NUMBER->SERIAL_NUMBER); JOB_DETAIL (DTL_KEY_SEQ -> SEQUENCE_KEY); JOB_HEADER (JOB -> JOB); JOB_OPERATIONS (SEQUENCE->SEQ, SUFFIX->SUFFIX); OE_MULTI_SHIP (SHIPTO -> SHIP_SEQ); ORDER_HEADER (ORDER_NO -> ORDER_NO); ORDER_LINES (ORDER_LINE->RECORD_NO, ORDER_SUFFIX->RECORD_NO); PO_HEADER (PURCHASE_ORDER -> PURCHASE_ORDER); PO_LINES (PO_LINE -> RECORD_NO); PO_RECEIVER (RECEIVER -> RECEIVER_NO); SHIPMENT_HEADER (INVOICE->ORDER_NO, INVOICE_SEQUENCE->ORDER_SUFFIX); SHIPMENT_LINES (INVOICE_LINE -> ORDER_SUFFIX)

**ITEM_HIST_USR** -> INVENTORY_MSTR (LOCN->LOCATION, PART->PART); ITEM_HISTORY (KEY_TIME -> TIME_ITEM_HISTORY)

**ITEM_MASTER** -> BIN_MASTER (BIN -> BIN); COUNTRY_CODES (COUNTRY_OF_ORIGIN -> CODE); INVENTORY_MSTR (PART -> PART); PO_HEADER (PO_NUMBER -> PURCHASE_ORDER); PO_LINES (PO_LINE_NO -> RECORD_NO); USER_INFORMATION (USERID -> GS_USER)

**ITEM_MAST_DIMS** -> INVENTORY_MSTR (LOCN->LOCATION, PART->PART); ITEM_MASTER (BIN->BIN, HEAT->HEAT, LOT->LOT, SERIAL_NUMBER->SERIAL_NUMBER)
